SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-06-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:26am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Jean Kong, Not reported, D525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, Luxor Cabs appears by driver-Mr.Curien with counsel C. Martin Gibson and Rick; Respondent, Peter Hannibal appears as pro per. Parties, previously sworn, respectivel present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHR (A) VARIOUS MEDICAL BILLS STATEMENT
EXHA (1) Trial Memorandum

10:35AM
Matter is submitted. Newly evidence retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
